name: Paramount Group, Inc.
description: Paramount Group, Inc. is a fully-integrated real estate investment trust (REIT) that specializes in owning, operating, managing, acquiring, and redeveloping high-quality, Class A office properties. The company focuses its portfolio on select central business district submarkets in New York City and San Francisco. As a publicly traded company on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PGRE, Paramount Group leverages its in-house expertise to provide comprehensive asset management, leasing, and financing services, maintaining a strategic presence in some of the most prominent and competitive commercial real estate markets in the United States.
